query:
UPDATE grading_jobs
                SET status = $3,
                    cancel_requested_at = COALESCE(cancel_requested_at, $2),
                    cancel_expires_at = NULL,
                    finished_at = $2,
                    lease_expires_at = NULL,
                    worker_id = NULL,
                    claimed_at = NULL,
                    started_at = NULL,
                    last_heartbeat_at = NULL
                WHERE id = $1
